capabilities.title: Knowledge Ingest
capabilities.content: Split long documents from workspace/knowledge into memory graph storage with ingest_knowledge_document.

capabilities.title: Memory Management
capabilities.content: Manage, query, organize, update, and link memory graph content through manage_knowledge.

capabilities.title: Messaging
capabilities.content: Send and receive AgentMail through MainServer using ReceiveMessagesMiddleware and SendMessagesMiddleware.
